home.title: 🏆 My Volley
home.subtitle: Scouting & Stats Volleyball
home.howItWorksP1: 1. "New Match" → name the teams and you're set.
home.howItWorksP2: 2. Add players and their jersey numbers to the Roster — everything is automatically synced to the Cloud.
home.howItWorksP3: 3. "+" below the score → action → interactive court (precision x/y coordinates) → player. Done.
home.howItWorksP4: 4. "End Set" to switch sets. Sides swap automatically.
home.howItWorksP5: 5. Per-player stats, precision heatmap and AI-powered tactical analysis in the Stats tab.
home.howItWorksP6: 6. Export as PNG, Excel or share via a unique link.
home.finishMatchDesc: The current set will be finalized and the match will be marked as finished. This action is irreversible.
home.deleteMatchDesc: This action is irreversible. All match data will be lost.
home.inviteDesc: Share My Volley with your teammates and coaches!
home.inviteAlreadyRegistered: This user is already registered on My Volley!
home.inviteText: Check out My Volley, the live volleyball stats app!
home.inviteErrorDesc: Could not copy the link. Please try again.
home.welcomeText: The app dedicated to volleyball coaches and players who want to analyze their game with precision. Count points, generate heatmaps and export your statistics.
home.shareMatchText: Check out the stats from this match!
home.whatsNewSavedPlayersDesc: Save time when creating matches by storing your regular players and default roster.
home.whatsNewCustomActionsDesc: Create your own tailor-made statistics to track exactly what matters to your team.
home.whatsNewPerfModeDesc: Analyze your game in depth: track every ball touch, trace the exact position of each action, and visualize trajectories on the court.
home.whatsNewTournamentsDesc: Organize, register teams, and share live scores with players and spectators.
home.whatsNewSpotsDesc: Find volleyball courts near you, add your favorite spots and check out photos and comments from other players.

credits.title: Project Story
credits.storyP1: My Volley was developed with passion by Antonin Marcon, an independent developer based in South-West France. The app was initially created for a very personal need: helping his own volleyball team analyze their matches and improve (hence the project name!).
credits.storyP2: Today, the tool is open to all volleyball enthusiasts who want to track and analyze their performance with precision.
credits.supportDesc: My Volley is free and will remain so. If you enjoy the app, you can support its development with a small coffee!
credits.basketDesc: Complete scouting, match sheets and live team statistics.
credits.tennisDesc: Ultra-precise set-by-set tracking, match dynamics and bounce zones.
credits.padelDesc: 100% Padel scouting: Point mapping, faults and pair analysis.

settings.feedbackPlaceholder: Tell us what you think, what could be improved…

settings.logoTooLarge: Image must be less than 2 MB.
settings.notifDesc: Get daily tips to make the most of My Volley.
settings.notificationsDenied: Notifications have been blocked. Change permissions in your browser settings.
settings.notificationsDeniedInfo: Notifications are blocked. Change permissions in your browser settings.
settings.iosNotifWarning: To enable notifications on iPhone, first add My Volley to your Home Screen (Share button ⎙ > Add to Home Screen).
settings.notifNotSupported: Push notifications are not supported by your browser.

help.title: Help center
help.scoringP1: Tap "+" below the scoring team's score, choose the action (attack, ace, opponent fault…), then tap on the court to place the point. Then select the relevant player.
help.scoringP2: The score updates automatically. Each action awards 1 point (except neutral events like reception).
help.heatmapP1: In the Statistics tab, the heatmap shows the impact zones for each team. Hot zones (red) indicate where the most points were scored.
help.heatmapP2: Filter by set and action type (attacks, faults, aces…) for ultra-precise tactical analysis. Export the heatmap as PNG for your training reports.
help.teamP1: Add your players with their jersey numbers in the Roster. Numbers significantly speed up live scouting — instantly identify the player on the court.
help.teamP2: Players and their statistics are synced to the Cloud and reusable across matches.
help.volleyballScored: Points Won: Attack, Ace, Block, Tip, Second touch.
help.volleyballFaults: Opponent faults: Out, Net, Missed serve, Block Out, Gameplay fault, Opponent fault.
help.volleyballNote: The set ends manually with "End Set". Sides swap automatically.
help.exportDesc: Export your stats as PNG (screenshot), detailed Excel (XLSX) set by set, or share the match via a unique read-only link.
help.playersDesc: Save your regular players from the 'Players' menu. You can then add them in one click when creating a match, along with their default jersey numbers.
help.actionsDesc: If standard stats aren't enough, create your own action buttons (e.g., 'Block out', 'Net foul') from the 'Actions' menu. They will appear on the match interface.
help.perfModeDesc: Enable Performance Mode when creating a match to unlock the interactive court. You can click on the court to log the origin and destination of every ball, and generate heatmaps.
help.tournamentsDesc: Create a tournament from the main menu. Share the link or QR code with players so they can register and log scores for their games. A Spectator link allows everyone to follow the tournament bracket live.
help.spotsDesc: Discover the community map of volleyball courts. Search for a court near you, suggest a new one with photos and description, and leave comments to help the community.

userMenu.feedbackPlaceholder: Tell us what you think, what could be improved…

scoreboard.confirmEndMatchDesc: Are you sure you want to end this match? This will finalize the score and generate final statistics. You won't be able to add more points.
scoreboard.touchCourtNeutral: Tap the court where the action occurred

stats.noHeatmap: Heatmap is not available for matches played without interactive court.

pwa.iosInstall: Tap the "Share" button ⎙ then "Add to Home Screen" to install the app.
pwa.androidInstall: Tap the three dots ⋮ then "Install app" for quick access.

players.title: My Volleyball Players
players.jerseyNumbersInfoDesc: Using numbers significantly speeds up live stat tracking during a match. They will be displayed next to the player's name.

shared.matchNotFoundDesc: This share link does not exist or has been removed.

resetPassword.title: New password
resetPassword.minLength: Password must be at least 6 characters.

matchPage.helpVolleyP1: 1. Tap "+" below the score of the relevant team. An animated arrow indicates the selected team.
matchPage.helpVolleyP2: 2. Choose the tab: Points Won (Attack, Ace, Block, Tip, Second touch) or Opponent Faults (Out, Net, Missed serve, Block Out).
matchPage.helpVolleyP3: 3. Click the action then place it on the court (allowed zone lights up) and select the player. You can also rate the quality of the action if enabled.
matchPage.helpVolleyP4: 4. Manage sets: "End Set" finishes and swaps sides. The winner 🏆 = most sets won.
matchPage.helpVolleyP5: 5. Statistics & Replay: Stats tab to see points per player + heatmap. Click on a completed set in the history to activate Replay mode.
matchPage.helpVolleyP6: 6. Export & Share: PNG stats, court per set, Excel, or share the score via WhatsApp / Telegram / X.

actionsDesc.attack: Successful attack landing in the opponent's court.
actionsDesc.ace: Direct serve that the opponent cannot return.
actionsDesc.block: Point scored at the net with a block.
actionsDesc.bidouille: Tip or deflection at the net that deceives the opponent.
actionsDesc.seconde_main: Point scored on the 2nd touch (attacking pass).
actionsDesc.other_offensive: Offensive action that doesn't fit any other category.
actionsDesc.out: Ball sent out of bounds by the opponent.
actionsDesc.net_fault: Opponent touches the net or sends the ball into the net.
actionsDesc.service_miss: Missed serve: ball doesn't clear the net or goes out.
actionsDesc.block_out: The block deflects the ball out of bounds.
actionsDesc.gameplay_fault: Includes net faults, penetration faults or line faults.
actionsDesc.opponent_fault: Any fault committed by the opponent without a specific action.
actionsDesc.other_volley_fault: Fault that doesn't fit any other category.
actionsDesc.timeout: Timeout called by one of the teams.

actionsConfig.title: My Volleyball Settings
actionsConfig.description: Fully customize your stat buttons: hide unused actions, create your own and add "Match Events" (neutral actions) to track reception, passing or defense without affecting the score.

notifications.promptText: Enable notifications to receive daily analysis tips and match reminders.
